text:
Gonna pin this 

After 7 years working as a dev, I quit my job to pursue my dream: build software I love and make a living out of it.

I have:
– Ideas
– Backup plans
– No wife, no kid
– Saving for 2+ years
– And most of all: Faith in myself

Let's see if I can make it!

They say I make $45K/month just by pure luck and just by posting my MRR on Twitter 

I'll ignore them and have my 8 years of GitHub graph printed on my wall as a self-reminder
A frontend engineer compiling their “hello world” app in 2022:
